CREATE TABLE test_charset (original_string String, source_encoding String, target_encoding String);
SELECT convertCharset(original_string, source_encoding, target_encoding) AS converted_string FROM test_charset;

SELECT a.converted_string, b.extra_info FROM (SELECT convertCharset(original_string, source_encoding, target_encoding) AS converted_string FROM test_charset) AS a JOIN additional_data AS b ON a.converted_string LIKE '%Hello%';
SELECT convertCharset(original_string, source_encoding, target_encoding) AS converted_string FROM test_charset WHERE original_string IS NOT NULL;
SELECT convertCharset(original_string, source_encoding, target_encoding) AS converted_string FROM test_charset WHERE LENGTH(original_string) > 5;
SELECT convertCharset(original_string, 'UTF-8', 'UTF-16') AS utf16_string, convertCharset(original_string, 'UTF-8', 'ISO-8859-1') AS iso_string FROM test_charset;
SELECT convertCharset(original_string, 'ASCII', 'UTF-8') FROM test_charset WHERE NOT isEmpty(original_string);

SELECT convertCharset(original_string, source_encoding, target_encoding) AS converted_string FROM (SELECT original_string, source_encoding, target_encoding FROM test_charset WHERE LENGTH(original_string) <= 5) AS subquery;

SELECT convertCharset(original_string, source_encoding, target_encoding) AS converted_string FROM test_charset WHERE original_string IN (SELECT original_string FROM test_charset WHERE source_encoding = 'UTF-8');
